query: Run a retrospective on Epic 1 now that it's done — extract the lessons and tell me honestly whether it succeeded.
Let's retro the epic we just finished: what went well, what didn't, and what should we change for the next one?
We completed the epic. Do a post-epic review to capture lessons learned and assess whether the success criteria were met.
We're mid-sprint and a requirement just changed significantly — help me decide whether to re-plan or cut scope.
Investigate why this sync bug happens and trace what caused it.
Check sprint status and show me which stories are blocked or in review.
